ageatdiagnosis.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify the patient's age at diagnosis.

Output format: Age at diagnosis [age] years.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown age at diagnosis."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

biopsygrading.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify the biopsy grading (FNCLCC).

Output format: Biopsy grading (FNCLCC): [value].
Allowed values: 1, 2, 3, Other classification system high, Other classification system low, Biopsy grading not applicable, Unknown biopsy grading.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown biopsy grading."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

chemotherapy_end.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract chemotherapy end details.

Output format:
pre-operative chemotherapy ended on [provide date] after [provide number] of cycles because of [select reason]
post-operative chemotherapy ended on [provide date] after [provide number] of cycles because of [select reason]
If date is missing, keep [provide date]. If reason is missing, keep [select reason]. If cycles missing, keep [provide number].

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

Output format:
pre-operative chemotherapy with [select intent] started on [provide date] and utilized [select regimen] regimen.
post-operative chemotherapy with [select intent] started on [provide date] and utilized [select regimen] regimen.
If date is missing, keep [provide date]. If regimen is missing, keep [select regimen]. If intent is missing, keep [select intent].

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

occurrence_cancer.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify any other (non-index) cancers in the patient, past or concurrent.

Allowed values:
Occurrence of other cancer unknown at initial excision.
Occurrence of other cancer prostate cancer.
Occurrence of other cancer sarcoma.
Occurrence of other cancer breast cancer.
Occurrence of other cancer folliculoma ovari.
Occurrence of other cancer gastric adenocarcinoma.
Occurrence of other cancer : myoma uteri 2010.
Occurrence of other cancer : non-small cell lung cancer.
Occurrence of other cancer : prostate cancer, pT3bN1M0.
No information about occurrence of other cancers.
No previous or concurrent cancers.
If not mentioned, output: "No information about occurrence of other cancers."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

patient-status.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract the patient status at last follow-up.

Allowed values:
1. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive, No Evidence of Disease (NED)
2. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - metastases ([please select sites])
3. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - localised tumor
4. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - metastases (lung).
5. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - metastases (lung. other).
6. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - metastases (lung. soft tissue. other).
8. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - localised tumor.
For metastases, list all mentioned sites in parentheses.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown patient status."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

Previous cancer treatment: radiation, other.
Previous cancer treatment: radiation, surgery, other.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery, chemotherapy, radiation, other.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery, radiation, other.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery, radiation.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery.
No previous cancer treatments.
No previous or concurrent cancers.
If not mentioned, output: "No previous cancer treatments."

post-operative radiotherapy in total of [put total dose]Gy in [put number of] fractions ended on [put date] because of [select reason].
If date is missing, keep [put date]. If reason is missing, keep [select reason]. If dose is missing, keep [put total dose]. If number is missing, keep [put number of].

"There was a progression on [date]." (keep [put date] if unknown)
